hero.name: Endpoints
hero.tagline: A catalog of APIs builders at StoicSoft actually integrate
hero.description: Hand-reviewed public APIs with honest pricing, real auth notes, and the rate limits you’ll hit. Submitted by StoicSoft engineers during real integrations.

items.name: ServerCompass Probes API
items.tagline: Synthetic uptime probes as a service
items.description: Programmatic access to ServerCompass probes — create, list, and stream incident events. Built for teams replacing their cron-job monitoring setup.

items.name: Aether Retrieval API
items.description: Drop in a retrieval layer with tenant-scoped vector namespaces. Returns cited chunks with confidence scores — the same layer that powers Aether.

items.name: 1DevTool Registry API
items.description: Query the template registry that backs 1DevTool. Public, cacheable, rate-limited but generous. Great for template gallery apps.

items.name: Helix Payments API
items.description: Create payment intents, settle in USDC, off-ramp to fiat in 48 markets. Keys stay with you — the API only orchestrates routing and receipts.

items.name: Vaulta Treasury API
items.description: Consolidate balances, run reconciliation rules, and export audit trails — a fintech backend with opinionated defaults. A StoicSoft template product.

items.name: Open Roots Monitor API
items.description: Read-only access to our nonprofit partner’s sapling survival dataset across Iberia. CC-BY 4.0 licensed, great for research or dashboards.

items.name: Signal FM RSS API
items.description: The RSS + JSON feed for Signal FM, the StoicSoft studio’s weekly podcast. Includes transcripts and chapter markers.

items.name: Halo Habits API
items.description: A simple read API over your own Halo data. End-to-end encrypted sync means keys are held by the user, not the API.

items.name: Field Stock Photos
items.description: The StoicSoft studio’s own stock library — cityscapes from Lisbon, Porto, and Évora. Free for editorial under CC-BY.

items.name: Routine API
items.description: Create rituals, log streaks, and pair with a partner across devices. Powers the Routine indie app.

items.name: The Margin API
items.tagline: Archive API for a weekly newsletter
items.description: Read access to every issue of The Margin, the Sunday newsletter from the StoicSoft studio. Includes search and topic tags.

items.name: Elena Faro Prints API
items.description: Quick-lookup API over the current fine-art print editions. Built as a StoicSoft partner project.
